title: GCMD Trials Show Promise of Tracers in Combating Marine Biofuel Fraud
content: Three tracer technologies were deployed in six supply chain trials under real-world commercial conditions, without disrupting operational practices or compromising fuel quality.Â  -Â Among the tracer candidates trialled, the organic tracer emerged as the most practical solution, balancing cost, detectability, and scalability. It has released a landmark report on the worldâ€™s first field validation of tracer technologies in marine biofuel supply chains. Conducted in Singapore, Rotterdam, and other major bunkering hubs, the trials demonstrated that tracers can be integrated into existing marine biofuel supply chain practices without disrupting operations or compromising fuel quality.
author: Analysts Account
